span.p:
Poka-yoke mistake-proofing
+ standard work + root-cause the defect

span.p:
Pull / just-in-time —
produce to takt, not to capacity

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Balance the line to takt;
attack the bottleneck / constraint

span.p:
Push decisions + skills down;
kaizen participation

span.p:
Re-layout / co-locate;
shorten the physical / handoff path

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cut batch size; pull; cap WIP

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5S the workplace;
tools + info at the point of use

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Remove non-value-add steps;
match precision to the CTQ, don't gold-plate
